raw_consumer_statement:
Please refer to the following related complaints I have filed : XXXX XXXX I have made several attempts to reply back to the original complaint but continue to get the perpetual page loading as shown in the screen shot provided. As per CFPB instructions, I submitted a second complaint in order to reply to the first complaint. In the meantime, I was notified of an attempted charge to my locked Citibank credit card that I am sure is related to the original fraudulent charge of {$2100.00}. 
I received an email notification from Citi Cards on XX/XX/year> ( copy provided ) reporting an attempted XXXX charge to my locked Citi XXXX XXXX. The card is a replacement card for the original that was used by a fraudulent ticket agent to fraudulently charge {$2100.00} which I am trying to have removed from my credit card account. It seems that while Citibank was working on the charge dispute and made contact with the fraudulent vendor who pretended to be a XXXX XXXX ticket agent, they somehow provided the fraudulent party enough of my re-issued credit card number such that now, either the same party using a different name, or another associated fraudulent party, is attempting to test the ability to charge the card by making a XXXX charge attempt. When I received the email from Citi Cards, I called them and initiated a dispute on this attempted charge and closed the re-issued card. I stated the card in question had been locked since the fraudulent {$2100.00} charge, and never was used. My instincts tell me that this second fraudulent charge attempt is related to the first one. I implore Citibank to do the right thing and rescind all of the fraudulent charges that have been applied to my account and adjust the balance to zero. I have not received any merchandise or updates from the fraudulent party who went by the name of XXXX XXXX. 
This matter is of utmost importance because now I am past due in making a payment to Citibank on the fraudulent charges they have wrongfully applied to my credit card account. This is impacting my credit scores and is impacting my ability to move forward financially. 
Again, I implore someone who can help me to please assist with getting the whole fraudulent charge of {$2100.00} removed from my credit card and remove all related fees and charges. 
Thank you, XXXX XXXX XXXX
